Records.description: One-loop box diagram with alternating charged scalar $\eta^+$ (mass $m_1=m_\eta$) and Majorana fermion $N_i, N_j$ (masses $m_2=m_{N_{i,j}}$) propagators along the loop, contributing to $\ell_\alpha \to 3 \ell_\beta$ in the scotogenic model. External lepton momenta and masses are neglected (zero external momentum limit). The two independent Dirac structures yield the loop functions $D_1(x,y)=-1/((1-x)(1-y)) - x^2 \log x/((1-x)^2(x-y)) - y^2 \log y/((1-y)^2(y-x))$ and $D_2(x,y)=-1/((1-x)(1-y)) - x \log x/((1-x)^2(x-y)) - y \log y/((1-y)^2(y-x))$, with $x=\xi_i$, $y=\xi_j$ and $\xi_k = m_{N_k}^2/m_\eta^2$. Closed rational+log form, finite, listed in Appendix A.
Records.location: Section 3.2 Eq. (21); Appendix A Eqs. (A3)-(A4); Fig. 3
